titleStmt.title: SII 24.260: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 260. (A.R. No. 54 of 1892.) EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers a gift of 40,000 kāśu by Dēvaladēviyār probably identical with Sōmēśvara's queen (vide No. 274 below), daughter of ••• adavvai, towards the purchase of lands for running a service of offerings of food, sandal paste, musk, civet, etc., to god Raṅganātha and two other gifts of 10,000 kāśu and 5,000 kāśu by Bhāradvāji Āṇḍāṉ Śīrāṇḍāṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ and Āritan Śrī Gōvindaperumāḷ alias Vēdaneṟikāṭṭiṇāṉ Brahmārāyaṉ respectively towards purchase and maintainance of garden lands for offerings of garlands to the god. Mentions Raṅgaya Daṇḍanāyakkar, brother of Bhujabalabhīma Kēśava Daṇḍanāyakkar, as a Mahāpradhāna of king Vīra-Nārasimha and probably as related to Dēvaladēvī. The services were to take effect from Sunday, śu. Pañchamī of Kārttika in the cyclic year Vijaya. These details correspond to A.D. 1233, October 9, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇapratāpaccakkaravatti pocaḷa śrīvīranārasiṅhatevar � mahāpradhānam bhujabalabhīma kecavataṇṭanāyakkar tampi raṅgayataṇṭanāyakkar ṭatta
�tavvaiy makaḷ tevalateviyār śrī raṅganātaṉukku vijaiya sammaRead samvat t sarattu kārttikai śuddha pañcami Ādivāra mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku nālu taḷikai Amu
ṭum Amutupaṭikkum cantaṉam cāttu puḻukuney kastūri kalppūram Uḷḷiṭṭa cāttuppaṭikkum neyyamutu tiruviḷakku Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka koṇṭa kāverikkaraikku teṟku putuccerik ku meṟku Ālaṅkuṭikku vaṭakku taṇṭuṟai kāraikkuṭikku kiḻakku naṭuvupaṭṭa cātta
ṇṭu tantu Itil Upayaṅkoṇṭu cevvikkakkaṭavatāka vilai niccayittu tanta kācu 4 10000 Ikkācu nāṟpatiṉāyiramuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Innilam Eṇ veliyum tiru
Ittaḷikai nālum cantirādittavarai Amutu ceytaruḷakkaṭavatāka vum Iccantikku tirunantavaṉam ceytu tirumālai Eṭukka tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavar kaḷil perumpuliyū
m tiruvaraṅkattu sabhaiyāril bhāradvāji Āṇṭān cirāṇṭān bhaṭṭaṉum Āritan śrīkovinta perumāḷāṉa vetaneṟi kāṭṭiṉāṉ brahmārāyaṉum tiruṉantavaṉam
tavaṉattukku vilaikoḷḷa tanta kācu patiṉāiramum Ittiru nantavaṉam ceykiṟa Ivakaḷukku jivaṉaśeṣamāka nilam velikku kācu Aiyāyiramum kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunan
tarādittavarai ceyyakkaṭavatāka niścaittu Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavomā ṉom Itu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai ..dānam vāpālanam vāpi dānāccreyonu pālanam
lanādacyutam padam . svadattaām paradattaām vā yo haretavasundharaḥ (rām) . ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa(rṣa)sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyām jāyate krimiḥ— Ivarkaḷ mūvar
Digital edition of SII 24.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
